sentences.english: I always keep it in my bag because the weather changes quickly.
sentences.korean: 날씨가 빨리 변하니까 항상 가방에 넣고 다녀요.

sentences.english: Last week I lent it to my friend and she forgot to return it.
sentences.korean: 지난주에 친구에게 빌려줬는데 반환하는 걸 잊었어요.

sentences.english: Of course it rained the next day and I got completely wet.
sentences.korean: 당연히 다음 날 비가 왔고 완전히 젖었어요.

sentences.english: Now I always carry a spare one just in case.
sentences.korean: 이제 만약을 위해 여분을 항상 가지고 다녀요.

quiz.question: What does '만약을 위해' mean in English?
